name: Web and Mobile App Development
description: Crafting visually appealing and user-friendly interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks like React, React Native, Next.js, and Flutter.

name: AI Application Development
description: Integrating generative AI capabilities, image generation, and intelligent workflows.

name: API Development and Integration
description: Designing and developing RESTful APIs and integrating them with frontend applications.

name: Performance Optimization
description: Optimizing applications for better performance and user experience.

name: Version Control
description: Managing changes to code over time using systems like Git.

name: Unit testing and debugging
description: Writing and running tests to ensure code quality and identifying issues.
